title: Iran foreign minister says Strait of Hormuz 'completely open'
snippet: Araghchi: 'In line with the ceasefire in Lebanon, the passage for all commercial vessels through Strait of Hormuz is declared completely open for the remaining period of ceasefire.' Conditions: designated routes coordinated by Iran Ports and Maritime Organisation, routes near Larak island (Iran's side), commercial vessels only, no hostile country cargo.
tag_reason: 이란의 호르무즈 해협 완전 개방 선언은 전쟁 이후 최초의 해협 개방으로 완전히 새로운 전개
